title: Console Legacy Pack
description: aims to bring back legacy edition to Minecraft Java
body:
# Console Legacy Pack

Console Legacy pack aims to bring back Xbox 360 Legacy Edition textures to Minecraft Java.

This pack is designed and created for Legacy4J however does work for default Minecraft too.



This pack isn't designed to replace programmer art but used alongside

# Current Plan

There are plans to redo ALL the textures in Minecraft However this will take awhile to do so please be patient.
